title: Continuous background animation ignores reduced-motion preferences
reasoning: The component always starts three infinite animations and does not include a `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` override. Users who have requested reduced motion will still receive large drifting background movement, which is a correctness/accessibility issue for this UI component.
recommendation: Add a `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` rule that disables or greatly simplifies the orb animations.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are listed for this feature, and the component has no coverage asserting reduced-motion CSS behavior.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a component/CSS regression test or snapshot that verifies the rendered style contains a `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` rule disabling `.orb1`, `.orb2`, and `.orb3` animations.
